title: REST API v2 - ping - fix typo in header
body: There seems to be a typo in one of the response headers of the `GET /_ping` endpoint. It sets a header named "Libpod-Build**ha**-Version".

comments.body:
/approve
/lgtm
/hold
Thanks @riyad Hopefully at some point the CI system will start working again.
